heading: Remittance addresses: regulation of alterations
label: 2785 Remittance addresses: regulation of alterations
notes: Regulations, , , provided that:Pub. L. 106–65, div. A, title IX, § 933(b)(2)113 Stat. 730Oct. 5, 1999“Regulations under , United States Code, as added by subsection (a), shall be prescribed not later than 180 days after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”section 2785 of title 10Oct. 5, 1999

A, title IX, § 933(b)(2)113 Stat. 730Oct. 5, 1999“Regulations under , United States Code, as added by subsection (a), shall be prescribed not later than 180 days after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”section 2785 of title 10Oct. 5, 1999

children.text: a remittance address for a disbursement that is provided by an officer or employee of the Department of Defense authorizing or requesting the disbursement is not altered by any officer or employee of the department authorized to prepare the disbursement; and

children.label: A
children.text: is requested by the person to whom the disbursement is authorized to be remitted; and

children.label: B
children.text: is made by an officer or employee authorized to do so who is not an officer or employee referred to in paragraph (1).
